event_description: Fired on the client when a user submits the login form.
Fired server-side when authentication succeeds and a JWT session is created.
Fired server-side when a new staff account is created and WhatsApp notification is sent.
Fired server-side when a contact form submission is emailed to the studio.
Fired on the client when an employee submits a work log update for a task step.
Fired on the client when a task step reaches 100% progress and is marked complete.
Fired on the client when an employee submits a manual override / custom task log entry.
Fired server-side when new tasks are created and assigned to employees in a project.
Fired server-side when a project's payment progress percentage is updated.
Fired server-side when an executive submits a rating review for a client lead.
